_fixture_notes: Case 13: Recipe with every ingredient at amount: null. Variations: 'to taste', 'to serve', 'for drizzling', 'to scatter'. Tests display of recipes with no scalable quantities — shopping-list scaling logic, ingredient render, and whether the UI flags this as unscalable or handles it gracefully.
name: Finishing Plate
description: A pure-finisher plate of garnishes and seasonings, used as a shared serving board. Fixture exercising amount: null across every ingredient.

steps.title: Assemble the plate
steps.content: Drizzle the dish with {0001}, scatter generously with {0002}, {0003} and {0006}. Garnish with {0005} and {0004}. Serve {0007} alongside.

notes: Quantities are deliberately left unspecified — adjust to the dish being finished.
